intro.title: Hello, I'm Zhengbing He
intro.desc:
Professor in Autonomous and Intelligent Systems
University of Nottingham Ningbo China


· As a principal investigator, I have secured funding exceeding $1 million for national-level key projects.
· I have published 180+ academic papers, including 50+ papers published in top-tier journals such as Transportation Research and IEEE Transactions.
· I have published papers covering all sub-journals of Transportation Research series, including more than 20 TRC papers and over 10 TITS papers, as well as one Nature correspondence article.
· Total citations reach over 8000, with an i10-index above 100 and an H-index exceeding 40.
· I am an IEEE Senior Member and have been listed among the World’s Top 2% Scientists, ranking 67 out of 30588 researchers in Transportation & Logistics.
· I hold multiple editorial positions including Senior Editor for IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems, Deputy Editor-in-Chief for IET Intelligent Transport Systems, Associate Editor for IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Vehicles and Editorial Advisory Board Member for Transportation Research Part C.

My research focuses on the intersection of urban mobility, systems engineering and artificial intelligence. It covers traditional research directions including traffic flow operation and control, transportation sustainability and system resilience, as well as emerging fields such as data-driven traffic modeling, autonomous driving and large language model applications. I am a pioneer in AI-driven transportation modeling and autonomous vehicle enabled traffic congestion mitigation, and also an early innovator engaged in generative AI application research within the transportation industry.

item0.title: Pioneer in AI-Based Transportation Modeling
item0.desc:
· Put forward innovative kNN data-driven car-following model in 2014, widely recognized as one of the earliest representative studies in this field.
· Developed the first deep learning lane-changing model based on DBN and LSTM in 2019, which has been widely cited and affirmed by peers.
· Led the research of CNN-based network-wide traffic speed prediction model, with high academic influence and large citation volume.
· Completed a series of researches on trajectory prediction, shared travel demand prediction and travel time prediction based on various intelligent algorithms.

These research results have been published in many high-level academic journals and have effectively promoted the development of intelligent traffic prediction technology.

item1.title: Early Practitioner of LLM in Transportation
item1.desc:
· Took the lead in exploring LLM-based intelligent driving assistance related research since 2023.
· Verified the actual improvement effect of prompt engineering on traffic prediction accuracy.
· Built AI agent models suitable for daily travel route selection scenarios.
· Was invited twice by SAE International in 2024 to share relevant research progress.
· Published academic correspondence articles in Nature in early 2026.

A series of early research results have attracted wide attention in the academic circle and laid a solid foundation for the follow-up research of large models in the transportation field.

item2.title: Autonomous Driving Congestion Mitigation Strategy
item2.desc:
· Proposed feedback control congestion mitigation strategy and jam-absorption driving strategy for connected vehicles to solve highway traffic congestion problems.
· Put forward innovative lane-free autonomous driving traffic system and expanded it to pedestrian traffic research scenarios.
· Carried out in-depth research on surrounding vehicle motion prediction oriented to intersection conflict scenarios.
· Cooperated with well-known university scholars to sort out frontier research progress in this field.

The relevant research conclusions have been recognized and cited by many foreign research teams, with outstanding international academic influence.

item3.title: Traffic State Perception & Visualization
item3.desc:
· Completed systematic optimization research on time-space traffic diagram drawing method.
· Realized effective application of traffic wave perception construction method in actual large-scale traffic research projects.
· Carried out in-depth research in traffic data mapping, traffic emission estimation and data resolution improvement.

The related research methods have been independently adopted and applied by many research teams at home and abroad, and have strong practical engineering application value.

item4.title: Multidisciplinary Transportation Research
item4.desc:
· Conducted research on dynamic vulnerability assessment of transportation system.
· Established mesoscopic carbon emission estimation model combined with traffic dynamic characteristics.
· Completed empirical research on travel behavior and daily route selection rules.
· Published many highly cited review papers to sort out research progress in related fields.

It fully reflects my diversified research vision, solid academic ability and good team research coordination ability.

item5.title: Intelligent Rice Transplanting and Harvesting Robot
item5.desc:
· Adopts FreeRTOS embedded system architecture and is driven by DJI 3508 motors.
· Realizes precise positioning within ±5 mm and omnidirectional chassis movement function.
· Participates in pneumatic structure design and hardware circuit wiring work.
· Supports dual robot cooperative operation scene application.

It is a practical agricultural robot developed for field farm work scenarios.

item6.title: SliverWolf Desktop Quadruped & Manipulator
item6.desc:
· Open-source 12-degree-of-freedom serial desktop quadruped robot with manipulator structure.
· Mainly controlled by STM32F103, matched with high-precision MG92R steering gear.
· Rich open-source resources including structural drawings, hardware files and underlying control firmware.
· Supports voice recognition, inertial attitude, Bluetooth and multi-mode control.

It can realize daily walking, turning, crawling, interactive handshake and intelligent object grabbing and other rich actions.

item7.title: 3508 Legged Robot Drive Test Platform
item7.desc:
· A quadruped robot algorithm verification platform built based on DJI M3508 brushless motor.
· Has adjustable PID motor parameters and stable standing balance control function.
· Integrates gyro attitude calculation and laser radar fixed-height cruise function.
· Matches complete gait logic and field test verification scheme.

It is widely used in the development and debugging of competitive legged robot control programs.

item8.title: ROBOCON2024-PPS Positioning System
item8.desc:
· High-precision plane positioning system based on STM32 main control chip.
· Uses RS485 absolute encoder to collect displacement data to achieve millimeter-level positioning.
· Synchronously collects inertial attitude information to assist robot posture judgment.
· Can stably output data to the main control board for path planning and autonomous driving.

item9.title: Typst Chinese Resume Template Library
item9.desc:
· Rich editable resume templates covering multiple mainstream layout styles.
· Cooperates with VS Code plug-ins to realize real-time preview and one-click PDF export.
· Complete supporting documents including compilation commands and font configuration tutorials.
· Equipped with matching preview pictures and avatar material resources.

It greatly simplifies the typesetting work of academic resumes and daily formal documents.

item0.title: Robotics Engineer Learning Roadmap (Preview) - Lain-Ego on Zhihu
item0.desc:
· Sort out the whole learning system of robotics engineering direction.
· Split core modules such as motion control, environment perception and embedded development.
· Match phased learning plans and high-quality learning resource lists.

item1.title: A Guide to Career Paths in the Robotics Industry — for High School Students - KKR Database on Zhihu
item1.desc:
· Comprehensively sort out all development branches of the robotics industry.
· Clarify the corresponding relationship between university majors and industry employment directions.
· Help students establish clear future study and employment planning ideas.

item2.title: On the Organizational Maturity of University Robotics Competition Teams - KKR Database on Zhihu
item2.desc:
· Summarize the mature operation mode of university student robot teams.
· Put forward practical schemes for knowledge inheritance and team collaborative management.
· Provide effective reference for the stable long-term development of student competition teams.

event11.title: Internship at Qianxing Intelligence
event11.desc: Responsible for motion control and human-robot interaction R&D for humanoid robots.

event10.title: Launched LocoWiki Resource Hub
event10.desc: Built a resource platform integrating competition rules, technical sharing, paper reading lists and open-source project resources.

event12.title: Launched OpenDoge Open-Source Quadruped Crowdfunding
event12.desc: Served as core founding developer, responsible for algorithm and underlying driver development, and the project will be delivered officially in late June 2026.

event1.title: Open-Sourced SliverWolf Desktop Serial-Link Quadruped
event1.desc: Released self-developed desktop quadruped robot with voice interaction and manipulator collaboration functions.

event2.title: 2024 ROBOCON National Competition
event2.desc: Completed embedded control system development based on FreeRTOS to realize high-precision positioning and executive functions.

event4.title: Fujian Intelligent Marine Equipment Design Competition
event4.desc: Led the development of the control system of bionic underwater robot and won the grand prize.

event5.title: 2024 World Marine Equipment Conference
event5.desc: Represented the school to participate in the exhibition, and relevant achievements were reported by official media.

event6.title: 2025 ROBOCON National Competition
event6.desc: Independently completed full-stack development of legged robot and won many national second prizes.

event7.title: 2025 National Undergraduate Electronics Design Contest
event7.desc: Completed hardware design and production of the ranging system module and won the national second prize.

event8.title: Open-Sourced BRS Parallel-Link Quadruped Robot
event8.desc: Open-sourced all mechanical drawings and control codes of self-designed parallel quadruped robot.

event9.title: Internship at HighTorque Robotics
event9.desc: Participated in mechanical optimization, algorithm iteration and system joint debugging of bionic quadruped robot products.
